market_source: Yahoo Finance ^GSPC and ^IRX via project data_manager.load_backtest_data

lag_policy.weekly_fred: forward-filled to market sessions and shifted five market sessions before use
lag_policy.monthly_fred: forward-filled to market sessions and shifted 21 market sessions before use

INITIAL_CLAIMS_4W.source_note: Weekly initial jobless claims; weekly data lagged one trading week.

CONTINUING_CLAIMS_4W.source_note: Weekly continued claims; weekly data lagged one trading week.

TEMP_HELP.source_note: Monthly temporary help services employment; lagged 21 market sessions.

WEEKLY_HOURS.source: Average weekly hours of all employees, total private, FRED
WEEKLY_HOURS.source_note: Monthly average weekly hours; broad private series preferred where available.

JOLTS_OPENINGS.source_note: Monthly JOLTS job openings; history begins in 2000 and is shorter than the market sample.

JOLTS_QUITS.source_note: Monthly JOLTS quits rate; history begins in 2000 and is shorter than the market sample.

ISM_EMPLOYMENT.source: Monthly ISM manufacturing employment diffusion index; tested only if FRED returns usable free data.

CONFERENCE_BOARD_LABOR_DIFFERENTIAL.source: Conference Board Consumer Confidence labor differential
CONFERENCE_BOARD_LABOR_DIFFERENTIAL.error: No free direct FRED series or project data source identified; generally requires Conference Board or vendor access.

CHALLENGER_JOB_CUTS.error: No free direct point-in-time series in existing project data/FRED access; direct history generally requires vendor or manual download access.

best_with_95pct_cagr_retention.strategy: Temporary help employment falling 3m >= 2% decline / 3x-only cap to 2x
best_with_95pct_cagr_retention.notes: Monthly labor data are lagged 21 market sessions before affecting leverage.

best_with_90pct_cagr_retention.strategy: JOLTS openings falling 3m >= 0.5% decline / 3x-only cap to 2x
best_with_90pct_cagr_retention.notes: Monthly labor data are lagged 21 market sessions before affecting leverage.

ranking_policy: Practical ranking rewards drawdown improvement, CAGR retention, Sharpe improvement, and 3x-only throttles, while penalizing leverage churn. Primary screen also reports best overlays with >=95% and >=90% CAGR retention.

limitations.jolts: JOLTS openings and quits begin in 2000, so their effective overlap is shorter than the 30-year market sample.
limitations.ism: ISM employment is tested only when FRED NAPMEI is accessible as free data.
limitations.conference_board: Conference Board labor differential was not tested because no free direct source was identified.
limitations.challenger: Challenger job cuts were not tested because no free direct point-in-time source was identified.
limitations.vintages: FRED observation-date data are lagged, but this is not a full real-time vintage/ALFRED release-calendar simulation.
